question: What word is printed in red cursive text on the woman's white t-shirt during the segment where a semi-transparent overlay of yellow pasta appears on the right side of the screen? A. Sasha B. Sriracha C. Sincerely D. Vegan

What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: Yellow cheese sauce is poured over cooked fusilli pasta inside a silver saucepan. A wooden spoon lifts the coated pasta from a pot onto a white plate resting on a red and white checkered tablecloth. A woman with blonde hair wearing a white t-shirt speaks in front of a beige macrame wall hanging and round mirrors. Graphic overlays displaying Subscribe and images of the pasta dish appear beside the woman.

question: How many round mirrors with sunburst-style wooden frames are visible?

Describe the sequence of actions involving the pasta and sauce shown in the first ten seconds of the video.
canonical_answer: At 2s, yellow cheese sauce is poured onto fusilli pasta in a silver saucepan; at 4s, a hand pours sauce into a blender cup while a spoon lifts pasta; at 6s, a wooden spoon scoops the sauced pasta from the pot; at 8s, the pasta is served onto a white plate on a checkered cloth.

What happens to the squash mixture after it is blended?
canonical_answer: It is poured as a yellow sauce over cooked fusilli pasta.
